      • Compliance assistant (10 jobs)

      DRA IVF HOSPITAL

      Accounts Assistant

      Salem
      ₹15,000 - ₹22,000 (Employer provided)

      Accounting Staff Job Summary: The Accounting Staff is responsible for assisting with the daily financial operations of the company, including maintaining financial records, preparing reports, processing transactions, and ensuring compliance with accounting standards and company policies. Key Responsibilities: * Prepare and maintain financial records and reports * Process accounts payable and accounts receivable * Reconcile bank statements and company accounts * Assist in preparing monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reports * Monitor and record daily financial transactions * Prepare invoices, vouchers, and payroll support documents * Ensure accuracy of accounting data and documentation * Assist with budgeting and financial forecasting * Support audits and tax preparation activities * Maintain confidentiality of financial information * Ensure compliance with accounting principles and company procedures Qualifications: * Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field * Proven experience in accounting or bookkeeping is an advantage * Knowledge of accounting principles and financial reporting * Proficient in Microsoft Excel and accounting software * Strong attention to detail and accuracy * Good analytical and problem-solving skills * Ability to work independently and meet deadlines * Strong communication and organizational skills Preferred Skills: * Familiarity with ERP/accounting systems * Knowledge of tax regulations and compliance * Ability to handle multiple tasks efficiently Work Environment: * Office-based work environment * May require extended hours during month-end or audit periods

      Contact number :9361384586

      Pay: ₹15,000.00 - ₹22,000.00 per month

      Benefits:

      • Provident Fund

      Work Location: In person

      Base pay range

      The minimum salary is ₹15,000 and the max salary is ₹22,000.
      ₹15,000 – ₹22,000/mo (Employer provided)
      ₹18,500
      /mo Median
      Salem
